title: Token
description: An API token used to authenticate requests to the Fastly API on behalf of a specific user.

id.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the token.

user_id.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the user the token belongs to.

customer_id.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the customer.

scope.description: A space-delimited list of authorization scopes.

services.description: A list of service IDs the token is scoped to.

access_token.description: The token value used for authentication. Only returned on creation.

ip.description: The IP address of the client that last used the token.

last_used_at.description: The date and time the token was last used.

expires_at.description: The date and time the token expires.

created_at.description: The date and time the token was created.
